---
title: "Resume"
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="content">
  <p style="color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.9rem;">
    You can embed your resume here as a PDF viewer, or describe your experience below.
    Replace this section with your actual resume content.
  </p>
</div>
```

## Education

**Your University** — B.S. Computer Science  
*Expected Graduation: 202X*

## Experience

**Job Title** — Company Name  
*Month Year – Present*

- Key responsibility or achievement
- Key responsibility or achievement

## Relevant Coursework

Data Structures · Algorithms · Machine Learning · Database Systems · Software Engineering
